aboutMeAnswers: Stores individual answers submitted by clients or staff to 'About Me' questionnaires, linking each answer to a specific question, questionnaire instance, client, and company/location. Related to aboutMeQuestions and aboutMeTakenTable.
aboutMeQuestions: Defines the reusable question bank for 'About Me' assessments, including question text, display order, and soft-deletion support. Referenced by aboutMeAnswers.
aboutMeTakenTable: Records each completed or pending 'About Me' questionnaire instance for a client, tracking completion, approval, and decline status. Related to aboutMeAnswers via aboutmeTakenId.
accessPages: Controls which pages or features are accessible at a given company/location, with positional ordering. Related to accPage.
accPage: Defines the master list of application pages and access levels available in the system, including navigation paths and privacy flags. Referenced by accessPages.
actionOverwrite: Stores overrides for scheduled actions on a per-client/carer/recurrence basis, allowing custom action text to replace defaults. Related to adminRecurr and client/carer records.
actionsSectionPRSB: Stores structured care plan actions under PRSB (Professional Record Standards Body) format, linking goals to responsible persons, strategies, and review dates. Related to careplanTakenPRSB and client.
actionsV2: Defines reusable action templates available within a company/location. Referenced by actionsV2Status and actionsV2Required.
actionsV2Message: Stores log messages attached to required actions at specific workflow stages. Related to actionsV2Required.
actionsV2Required: Tracks the lifecycle of an assigned action for a specific client or carer, recording status transitions (pending, sent, complete, not required). Related to actionsV2Status, client, and carer.
actionsV2Status: Maps actions to workflow statuses with ordering. Related to actionsV2 and actionsV2Required.
actionsV2StatusFollowUp: Defines follow-up status transitions for actions, specifying what status should come after a given status. Related to actionsV2.
activeQRClocking: Records active QR code clock-in/out events for carers visiting clients, linking the scan to a timesheet entry. Related to carer, client, and timesheets.
adminContacts: Stores contact records (next-of-kin, emergency contacts, etc.) for clients or carers, including address, phone, email, and relationship. Related to client and carer.
adminHolidays: Records holiday and leave requests for carers, including date range, type, pay details, and approval status. Related to carer.
AdminListAccessLogs: Tracks which admin users have access to list views, error logs, and integrity checks. Related to carer (admin users).
adminLocationAccess: Controls which locations a specific carer/admin user can access. Related to carer and location.
adminLog: Audit log of administrative actions performed by admins, optionally linked to support tickets. Related to carer and company.
adminNotes: General-purpose notes written by admins about clients, carers, or visits, with seen/unseen tracking and optional sign-off. Related to carer, client, adminRecurr, and timesheets.
adminQualification: Stores qualification records (with file attachments) for carers, including award and expiry dates. Related to carer and company.
adminQualificationArchive: Archives deleted or superseded carer qualifications for audit purposes. Related to carer and adminQualification.
adminRecurr: Defines recurring visit schedules between a carer and client, including days, times, pay rates, and task assignments. Related to carer, client, and timesheets.
agencyWorker: Stores details of external agency workers associated with a company, including contact info and state. Related to company and location.
alert: Records system alerts triggered by status changes or late logins for clients or carers, with seen/unseen tracking. Related to carer and client.
alertAnswers: Links alert events to specific form answers that triggered them, supporting alert review workflows. Related to carer, client, and chartAnswers.
allowedUsernames: Whitelist of permitted usernames for a given company, used for access control. Related to company.
androidCopiedTimesheet: Stores timesheet data received and processed from Android app clock-in/out events, including GPS coordinates, task completion, and pay rates. Related to androidReceivedSchedules, carer, client, and timesheets.
androidReceivedSchedules: Raw schedule and clock-in/out data received from the Android carer app before processing into timesheets. Related to androidCopiedTimesheet.
api_users: Stores API credentials and bearer tokens for third-party systems integrating with the platform. Related to company and location.
appDownloadButton: Logs IP addresses that clicked the app download button, used for analytics. Standalone table.
appOnlyUse: Flags whether a particular company/location side (carer or client) should use the app exclusively. Related to company and location.
area: Defines geographic or operational areas (e.g. wards, care home zones) within a company/location. Referenced by carer, client, areaSearchSetup, and bankHolidayPersonalised.
areaSearchSetup: Links carers to specific areas for scheduling search purposes. Related to area and carer.
assessment: Records individual client assessments, including type, dates, outcome, and assigned carer. Related to assessmentType, assessmentOutcome, client, and carer.
assessmentHistory: Audit history of changes to client assessments, preserving previous dates, outcomes, and notes. Related to assessment and client.
assessmentOutcome: Defines possible outcomes for assessments within a company/location. Referenced by assessment and assessmentHistory.
assessmentType: Defines assessment types with default durations, colours, and linked outcomes. Referenced by assessment.
assessmentTypeEntry: Links assessment type groups to specific NH assessments for individual clients, with day-count configuration. Related to assessmentTypeGroup and client.
assessmentTypeGroup: Groups assessment types together under a named category per company/location. Referenced by assessmentTypeEntry.
assignedHours: Tracks allocated care hours for clients, including start dates, recurrence, and job type. Related to client and location.
auAnacClass: Defines ANAC (Australian National Aged Care) classification categories used for funding. Referenced by auAnacClassMinutes and auClientAnacClass.
auAnacClassMinutes: Stores required care minutes (total and RN) per ANAC class over effective date ranges. Related to auAnacClass.
auClientAnacClass: Assigns an ANAC classification to a client for a given effective period. Related to auAnacClass and client.
ausBillingHistory: Records all billing transactions for Australian clients, including timesheet-based charges, client contributions, government contributions, and invoice status. Related to client, carer, and timesheets.
ausBudgetCategories: Defines custom budget categories for Australian billing purposes within a company/location. Referenced by billing records.
aus_chsp: Stores CHSP (Commonwealth Home Support Programme) demographic and consent data for Australian clients. Related to client.
aus_chspHistory: Audit history of changes to a client's CHSP record. Related to aus_chsp and client.
autoScripts: Configuration table controlling which automated background scripts (travel calculations, holiday unassignment) are enabled per company/location. Standalone config table.
available: Records carer availability schedules including recurring days and times. Related to carer and company.
bandingTime: Defines time-banding rules (from/to time ranges mapped to an applied rate) within a group. Related to bandingTimeGroup and company.
bandingTimeGroup: Groups banding time rules under a named policy per company/location. Referenced by bandingTime and bandingTimeJobType.
bandingTimeJobType: Links banding time groups to specific job types, controlling which pay rules apply. Related to bandingTimeGroup and jobType.
bank: Stores bank time credits allocated to clients for specific job types or recurring visits. Related to client and adminRecurr.
bankHoliday: System-wide list of public bank holidays by country and year. Referenced by pay and billing calculations.
bankHolidayPersonalised: Allows companies to define custom public holidays with optional pay/billing rate increases and area targeting. Related to company, location, and area.
bankHolidayPersonalisedArea: Links personalised bank holidays to specific areas within a company. Related to bankHolidayPersonalised and area.
banks: Stores bank/invoice configuration for a company/location, including account details, invoice display preferences, and signature settings. Related to company and location.
batch: Defines named batch processing jobs (e.g. payroll or invoice batches) for a company/location. Related to company and location.
blacklistedCarers: Records client-carer incompatibility flags preventing scheduling matches, with reason comments. Related to client and carer.
BodyMetricsRecords: Stores clinical body metrics (height, weight, waist, admission measurements) recorded for clients by carers, with review dates. Related to client and carer.
bookmarkFolders: Allows users to organise saved bookmarks into named, coloured folders. Related to bookmarks and carer.
bookmarks: Stores user-saved page bookmarks with names, descriptions, and folder assignment. Related to bookmarkFolders and carer.
budgetApprovals: Records approved funding categories and contribution amounts for Australian client care packages. Related to client and location.
cache: Laravel application-level key-value cache store with expiration. Standalone infrastructure table.
cache_locks: Laravel cache lock table for preventing race conditions in concurrent processes. Standalone infrastructure table.
cancellationGroup: Groups related schedule cancellation events together, linking to status change records and client. Related to client and location.
carePlanAnswersPRSB: Stores the full PRSB-format care plan narrative answers including goals, funding sources, review dates, and sign-off details. Related to careplanTakenPRSB and client.
careplanClientLinkPRSB: Links clients to specific PRSB care plan templates. Related to careplanPRSB and client.
careplanPRSB: Defines PRSB care plan templates available to a company/location. Referenced by careplanTakenPRSB and careplanClientLinkPRSB.
careplanTakenPRSB: Records individual care plan instances taken for clients, including creation, sign-off, archive, and closure timestamps. Related to careplanPRSB, client, and carePlanAnswersPRSB.
carer: Core table storing all carer and admin staff records including personal details, login credentials, role, location assignment, and configuration flags. Central table referenced by nearly all operational tables.
carerAppLocations: Logs GPS coordinates captured during carer app clock events, recording distance from client location. Related to carer, client, and timesheets.
carerEditHistory: Audit trail of changes made to carer profile fields over time. Related to carer.
carerLocation: Maps carers to company locations and zones, supporting multi-location access. Related to carer and location.
carerOutHome: Links carers to care home locations they are authorised to work at. Related to carer and location.
carerPay: Defines pay scale rules including job types, day/time bands, and multipliers. Referenced by carerPayPick.
carerPayPick: Assigns a specific pay scale to an individual carer. Related to carer and carerPay.
carerPending: Staging table for carer registrations awaiting approval before being moved into the main carer table. Mirrors the carer table structure.
carerPic: Stores references to carer profile photos. Related to carer.
carerresume: Stores uploaded CV/resume files for carer applicants along with parsed contact and address data. Related to company and location.
carerScheduleConflicts: Logs the number of scheduling conflicts detected per day for a company/location. Related to company and location.
carerSignatures: Stores captured digital signature data URLs for carers. Related to company and location.
carerUpdate: Stores pending credential update requests (username/password changes) for carers awaiting processing. Related to carer.
carer_updates: Full audit log of all historical changes to carer records, preserving prior field values on each update. Related to carer.
caringAppCarer: Assigns carers to a specific app permission level within the mobile app. Related to carer and caringAppLevels.
caringAppLevels: Defines detailed mobile app permission profiles controlling which features, tabs, and actions are available to carers. Referenced by caringAppCarer and caringAppLocation.
caringAppLocation: Assigns a default app permission level to a company location. Related to caringAppLevels and location.
category: Simple lookup table of named categories, likely used for classifying notes, tasks, or documents. Standalone.
chart: Defines observation/monitoring chart templates (e.g. vital signs, fluid charts) with optional folder grouping. Referenced by chartQuestions, chartAssign, and chartTaken.
chartAlertBaselines: Links baseline thresholds to alerts, storing limit values and recommended actions. Related to chartAlerts and chartBaselines.
chartAlerts: Records alert events triggered when a chart answer breaches a configured baseline. Related to chart, chartQuestions, and chartAnswers.
chartAnswers: Stores individual answers recorded during a client chart entry session. Related to chartTaken and chartQuestions.
chartAssign: Assigns a chart to a client with scheduling rules (days, recurrence, date range). Related to chart, client, and chartAssignTimes.
chartAssignTimes: Defines specific time slots within a chart assignment, including time periods and outcome IDs. Related to chartAssign.
chartBaselineNumerics: Stores numeric threshold rules (above/below alert levels) for chart question baselines. Related to chartBaselines.
chartBaselineOptions: Stores option-based alert rules for multi-choice chart questions within a baseline. Related to chartBaselines.
chartBaselines: Links a chart and question to a client, establishing a monitoring baseline that drives alerts. Related to chart, chartQuestions, client, carer, company, and location.
chartQuestionAnswers: Defines the selectable answer options for a chart question. Related to chartQuestions.
chartQuestions: Defines the individual questions within a chart template, including type, measure, and display order. Related to chart and chartAnswers.
chartTaken: Records each completed chart observation session for a client, linking to the chart, carer, assignment, and time. Related to chart, client, carer, and chartAnswers.
